response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack development experience and some recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators at Naver, pricing automation at Tencent). However, explicit experience with GenAI-specific technologies (vector databases, RAG, multi-agent systems) is minimal, and the resume lacks direct mention of LLM performance metrics or cloud-based AI system design. The strong general engineering background and recent AI-adjacent work justify a 'maybe' for further evaluation.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack development with strong expertise in TypeScript and cloud technologies (AWS, MongoDB, Docker)
Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators) at Naver
Proven leadership in technical domains (e.g., founding GISCollective, organizing workshops, mentoring teams)
concerns: Limited explicit experience with GenAI core technologies (vector databases, RAG, multi-agent systems) or LLM optimization
No mention of Python in recent roles despite job requiring Python proficiency
Short tenure in current GenAI-adjacent role (since April 2025) may limit depth of AI system design expertise

key_factors.factor: Cloud platform and AI infrastructure experience
